sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103855" key="thna/llws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τηνάλλως</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τὴν ἄλλως</orth>, <sense id="n103855.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἄλλως</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
